name: Regions
author: ahkimn
description:
# SubwayBuilder Regions

## Summary

> **SubwayBuilder Regions** imports real-world geographic regions into SubwayBuilder.
>
> The mod adds interactive map layers and panels for region-level population, commuter flow, and infrastructure statistics.

_Latest Mod Version:_ `v0.5.0`  
_Latest Tested Game Version:_ `v1.4.18`  
_Latest Changelog Entry:_ [v0.5.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions/blob/main/docs/regions/CHANGELOG.md#v050---2026-07-22)

## Features

- **Interactive Map Layers**: Displays region-based data as interactive layers on the in-game map.
  - Multiple region layers can be loaded per city.
  - Each region layer is exposed in the game's `Map Layers` toggle screen.
- **Region-Level Information**: Selecting a region exposes population, area, commuter, station, track, and route statistics where data is available.
- **Settings Menu**: Adds a `Regions` entry in the main menu for dataset discovery, registry visibility, refresh, and cleanup controls.
- **Dynamic Data State**: Region-based commuter data updates from the current game state.
- **Compressed Data Support**: Runtime and scripts support both `.geojson` and `.geojson.gz` datasets.
- **Preset Data Support**: Online fetch flows are available for AU, CA, FR, GB, and US; local release bundles are available for CN, CZ, EE, JP, LT, LV, PE, PL, TW, and UA.

## Supported Countries & Region Types

- **AU** (Australia)
  - Statistical Areas Level 3
  - Statistical Areas Level 2
  - Commonwealth Electoral Divisions
  - State Electoral Divisions
  - Local Government Areas
  - Postal Areas
- **CA** (Canada)
  - Federal Electoral Districts
  - Provincial Electoral Districts
  - Census Subdivisions
  - Forward Sortation Areas
- **CN** (China)
  - 区县 (`cn-districts`)
  - 街道/乡镇 (`cn-subdistricts`)
- **CZ** (Czechia)
  - Okresy
  - Obce
  - ZSJ
- **EE** (Estonia)
  - Maakonnad
  - Omavalitsused / linnaosad
  - Asustusüksused
- **FR** (France)
  - Départements
  - Arrondissements
  - Cantons
  - EPCI
  - Communes
- **GB** (United Kingdom)
  - Local Authority Districts
  - Westminster Parliamentary Constituencies
  - Built-up Areas
  - Electoral Wards
- **JP** (Japan)
  - 市町村区 (`shichouson`)
  - 大字 (`ooaza`)
- **LT** (Lithuania)
  - Savivaldybės
  - Seniūnijos
  - Gyvenamosios vietovės
- **LV** (Latvia)
  - Novadi un valstspilsētas
  - Apkaimes un pagasti
- **PE** (Peru)
  - Provincias
  - Distritos
- **PL** (Poland)
  - Powiaty
  - Gminy
  - Rejony
- **TW** (Taiwan)
  - 鄉鎮市區 (`township`)
  - 里 (`li`)
- **UA** (Ukraine)
  - Райони (`ua-raions`)
  - Громади / міські райони (`ua-hromadas`)
  - Населені пункти (`ua-naseleni-punkty`)
- **US** (United States)
  - Counties
  - County Subdivisions, including towns, cities, and CDPs
  - ZIP Code Tabulation Areas

## Obtaining Boundaries

For full usage instructions, see the [Regions README](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions/blob/main/docs/regions/README.md#usage).

**Option 1: Premade Boundaries**

Download released city bundles from the shared [Google Drive](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TPlqNRh-zqJTIoTs-KUNdZHVVTS0QCzd?usp=drive_link), then unzip each city into its own `mods/regions/data/{CITY_CODE}/` directory.

Example:

```
mods/
  regions/
    index.js
    manifest.json
    data/
      ATL/
        counties.geojson.gz
        county-subdivisions.geojson.gz
        zctas.geojson.gz
      TPE/
        township.geojson.gz
        li.geojson.gz
```

**Option 2: Download From the Settings Menu**

From the Main Menu, click `Regions` to open the settings menu, then follow [Fetching Datasets In Game](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions/blob/main/docs/regions/README.md#fetching-datasets-in-game).

This option requires Node.js and terminal access.

## Bug Reporting

Please report bugs on [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-regions/issues) or in the mod's dedicated Discord thread. Include the game version, issue description, and save/context where relevant.
